pages.title: Compass
pages.text: Bond Compass is the strongest mobility recovery tool in the mod. Right click teleports you to your partner, including cross-dimension use when both players are online.
After use, Compass has a 30 second cooldown. This is intentional: it is not infinite mobility, it is controlled recovery that still requires planning and timing.
Use Compass to close navigation errors, recover from unsafe split states, and break dangerous distance chains before Lontananza pressure converts into direct wipe risk.
At high level, Compass is map control: one partner can anchor safety while the other scouts with bounded risk. The item creates tempo if your calls are clean.
$(bold)Recommended routine:$() call every Compass use in voice, especially during combat or dimension split. Timing clarity prevents overlap, panic use, and wasted cooldown cycles.
